_comment: Feature gate TEMPLATE. Lives at {container_uri}/meta/capabilities.json. Agents check capabilities before using optional features via: knowledge-paths.sh capability <name>. A 'true' value means the feature is supported AND expected to work. A 'false' value means the feature is either not available or deliberately disabled. Do not silently attempt disabled capabilities.
_init_instructions: 1. Copy this file to {container_uri}/meta/capabilities.json. 2. Set 'declared_at' to the current ISO timestamp. 3. Review each capability and set true/false based on what this deployment actually supports. 4. Bump 'driver_versions' when the path-resolution helper gains new schemes.

notes.icloud_storage: Set to true after Phase 7 migration moves the vault to ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/business-machine-vault/
notes.qmd_backend: Set to true after qmd is installed and the helper grows a qmd query driver
notes.child_mount_access: Always false for parent vaults — the parent must not read child-specific vaults directly
